pdf:

<#elseif .locale == "zh_TW">
<#elseif .locale == "ja_JP">
<#elseif .locale == "ko_KR">
<#elseif .locale == "th_TH">
</#if>
<#if subsidiary.id == "37">
<#if subsidiary.logo?length != 0>
</#if>
Premier Electric ${subsidiary.mainaddress_text?replace("Premier Electric", "")}
${record.subsidiary.url}
239-598-2000
<#elseif subsidiary.id == "29">
<#if (subsidiary.logo?length != 0) || (subsidiary.pagelogo?length != 0)>
</#if> <#if subsidiary.mainaddress_text?length != 0 > <#assign addressLines = subsidiary.mainaddress_text?split(r"
","r")> <#list addressLines as line>
${line} </#list> <#else> ${companyInformation.addressText} </#if>
Phone<#if subsidiary.phone?has_content> ${subsidiary.phone}</#if>
${record@title}
${record.trandate@label} ${record.trandate}
<#elseif subsidiary.id == "30">
${record.subsidiary}
${subsidiary.addr1}
${subsidiary.addr2} ${subsidiary.state} ${subsidiary.zip} ${subsidiary.country}
${subsidiary.custrecord_atlas_svcs_mm_phone}
scott@markade.net
${record.subsidiary.url}
<#elseif subsidiary.id == "56">
${record.subsidiary}
<#if subsidiary.addr1?has_content>${subsidiary.addr1}
</#if> <#if subsidiary.addr2?has_content>${subsidiary.addr2}
</#if> <#if subsidiary.city?has_content || subsidiary.state?has_content || subsidiary.zip?has_content>${subsidiary.city}, ${subsidiary.state} ${subsidiary.zip}
</#if> <#if subsidiary.custrecord_atlas_svcs_mm_phone?has_content>${subsidiary.custrecord_atlas_svcs_mm_phone}
</#if> <#if record.subsidiary.url?has_content>${record.subsidiary.url}</#if>
<#elseif subsidiary.id == "20">
${record.subsidiary}
${subsidiary.addr1}
${subsidiary.city} ${subsidiary.state} ${subsidiary.zip}
T: ${subsidiary.custrecord_atlas_svcs_mm_phone}
F: ${subsidiary.fax}
<#elseif subsidiary.id == "3" || subsidiary.id == "5">
<#if subsidiary.logo?length != 0 >
<#elseif companyInformation.logoUrl?length != 0 >
</#if>
<#if subsidiary.mainaddress_text?length != 0 > ${subsidiary.mainaddress_text}<#else>${companyInformation.addressText}</#if>
<#elseif subsidiary.id == "7">
<#assign bcLocAddress = ''> <#assign _suiteletURL = ("https://6962009.extforms.netsuite.com/app/site/hosting/scriptlet.nl?script=3022&deploy=1&compid=6962009&ns-at=AAEJ7tMQzJ_Jp02beofJ049FxjTkmrOtRTWdU4jcbdTCZUGkSPY&recid="+record.internalid+"&locid="+record.location.internalid+"&param=3") /> <#include _suiteletURL />
<#if subsidiary.logo?length != 0 >
<#elseif companyInformation.logoUrl?length != 0 >
</#if>
<#if record.cseg_bc_project.custrecord_bc_location == 'DHR Tampa Branch' || record.cseg_bc_project.custrecord_bc_location == 'DHR Atlanta Branch' || record.cseg_bc_project.custrecord_bc_location == 'DHR Nashville Branch' || !record.cseg_bc_project.custrecord_bc_location?has_content > ${bcLocAddress} <#else> <#if subsidiary.mainaddress_text?length != 0 > ${subsidiary.mainaddress_text} <#else> ${companyInformation.addressText} </#if> </#if>
<#elseif subsidiary.id == "46" || subsidiary.id == "47" || subsidiary.id == "48">
SUPREME HVAC-COMMERCIAL
${subsidiary.addressee?upper_case}
${subsidiary.addr1?upper_case}
${subsidiary.city?upper_case} ${subsidiary.state?upper_case} ${subsidiary.zip} <#if subsidiary.custrecord_atlas_svcs_mm_phone?has_content>
${subsidiary.custrecord_atlas_svcs_mm_phone} PHONE</#if>
Invoice
Date Invoice #
${record.trandate} ${record.tranid}
<#elseif subsidiary.id == "38">
<#if subsidiary.mainaddress_text?length != 0> <#assign addressLines = subsidiary.mainaddress_text?split(r"
", "r")> <#list addressLines as line> <#if line_index gt 0 && line != "United States">
${line}</#if> </#list> <#else> ${companyInformation.addressText} </#if> <#if subsidiary.phone?has_content>
Phone ${subsidiary.phone}</#if>
${record@title}
${record.trandate@label} ${record.trandate}
Invoice# ${record.tranid}
<#else>
<#if subsidiary.id == "16">
<#elseif subsidiary.id != "21">
<#else>
</#if>
<#if subsidiary.id == "16">
<#if subsidiary.mainaddress_text?length != 0> <#assign addressLines = subsidiary.mainaddress_text?split(r"
", "r")> <#list addressLines as line> <#if line_index gt 0>${line}
</#if> </#list> <#else> ${companyInformation.addressText} </#if> <#if subsidiary.phone?has_content>
Phone ${subsidiary.phone}</#if>
${record@title}
${record.trandate@label} ${record.trandate}
Invoice# ${record.tranid}
<#elseif (subsidiary.id == "21" && record.custbody_bc_progress_billing == true) || subsidiary.id != "21">
<#if subsidiary.logo?length != 0 || subsidiary.pagelogo?length != 0> <#if subsidiary.id == "7" || subsidiary.id == "5">
<#elseif subsidiary.id == "15" >
<#elseif subsidiary.id == "21">
<#elseif subsidiary.id == "10" >
<#elseif subsidiary.id == "4" >
<#elseif subsidiary.id == "19" >
<#elseif subsidiary.id == "13" >
<#else>
</#if> <#elseif companyInformation.logoUrl?length != 0 && subsidiary.id != "21">
</#if>
</#if>
<#if subsidiary.id != "16"> <#if (subsidiary.id == "21" && record.custbody_bc_progress_billing)>
<#if subsidiary.mainaddress_text?length != 0 > <#assign addressLines = subsidiary.mainaddress_text?split(r"
", "r")> <#list addressLines as line>
${line} </#list> <#else>${companyInformation.addressText} </#if>
Phone <#if subsidiary.phone?has_content> ${subsidiary.phone}</#if>
${record@title}
${record.trandate@label} ${record.trandate}
Invoice# ${record.tranid}
<#elseif subsidiary.id == "19">
<#if subsidiary.mainaddress_text?length != 0 > <#assign addressLines = subsidiary.mainaddress_text?split(r"
", "r")> <#list addressLines as line> ${line}
</#list> <#else>${companyInformation.addressText} </#if> Phone <#if subsidiary.phone?has_content> ${subsidiary.phone}</#if>
${record@title}
<#elseif (subsidiary.id == "21" && !record.custbody_bc_progress_billing)>
<#if subsidiary.mainaddress_text?length != 0 > <#assign addressLines = subsidiary.mainaddress_text?split(r"
", "r")> <#list addressLines as line> <#if line_index == 0> LLR Electric, LLC
${line} <#else>
${line} </#if> </#list> <#else>${companyInformation.addressText} </#if>
${record@title}
${record.trandate@label} Invoice#
${record.trandate} ${record.tranid}
</#if> </#if>
<#if subsidiary.id != "16" && subsidiary.id != "19" && subsidiary.id != "21">
<#if subsidiary.mainaddress_text?length != 0 > ${subsidiary.mainaddress_text} <#else>${companyInformation.addressText} </#if>
</#if>
</#if>
<#if subsidiary.id == "30" || subsidiary.id == "56">
Page
of
<#elseif subsidiary.id == "20">
FOUR STAR MECHANICAL, LLC "Performance That Earns Confidence" Since 1993
<#else>
<#assign footer_ltd_msg = record.subsidiary.custrecord_atlas_svcs_mm_doc_footer> <#if record.subsidiary.custrecord_atlas_svcs_mm_doc_footer?has_content> <#if footer_ltd_msg?has_content?length > 260> <#assign footer_ltd_msg = footer_ltd_msg?substring(0,260)></#if></#if> <#assign f_colspan_1 = 'colspan="4" style="align: left;"'> <#assign f_colspan_2 = 'colspan="5" style="align: left;"'> <#assign f_colspan_3 = 'colspan="5" style="align: left;"'> <#assign f_colspan_4 = 'colspan="5" style="align: left;"'>
${subsidiary.custrecord_atlas_svcs_mm_doc_footer} ${subsidiary.custrecord_atlas_svcs_mm_bankdetails}
<#if subsidiary.id == "16" || (subsidiary.id == "21" && record.custbody_bc_progress_billing)>
E-mail
${subsidiary.email?lower_case}
</#if> <#if subsidiary.id == "19">
We accept payment via check, Credit Card (fee applies), and ACH.
Thank you for your business.
</#if> </#if>
<#if subsidiary.id == "37">
<#elseif subsidiary.id == "30" || subsidiary.id == "56">
<#elseif subsidiary.id =="20">
<#elseif subsidiary.id == "3" || subsidiary.id == "5">
<#elseif subsidiary.id == "29">
<#elseif subsidiary.id == "16">
<#elseif subsidiary.id == "38">
<#else>
</#if>
<#if subsidiary.id == "37"> INVOICE
${record.billaddress@label?upper_case} ${record.shipaddress@label?upper_case}
INVOICE ${record.tranid}
DATE ${record.trandate}
DUE DATE ${record.duedate}
${record.billaddress} ${record.shipaddress}<#if record.cseg_bc_project?has_content>
Project: ${record.cseg_bc_project}</#if>
DATE OF SERVICE:
${record.custbody_date_of_service}
SCOPE:
${record.custbody_wallace_scope}
<#if record.item?has_content>
MATERIAL QTY RATE AMOUNT
${record.custbody_description_of_work}
<#list record.item as item>
${item.item?upper_case}
${item.description}
${item.quantity} ${item.rate}
${item.amount} <#if item.item.taxschedule == "Taxable">T</#if>
</#list>
</#if>
${record.subtotal@label?upper_case} ${record.subtotal}
TAX ${record.taxtotal}
${record.total@label?upper_case} ${record.total}
BALANCE DUE ${record.amountremaining}
<#elseif subsidiary.id == "30">
INVOICE
BILL TO JOB NAME INVOICE ${record.tranid}
${record.billaddress} <#if record.cseg_bc_project?has_content>${record.cseg_bc_project?replace('&','&')}<#else>${record.custbody_bc_job_address?replace('&','&')}</#if> DATE ${record.trandate}
ACTIVITY ITEM AMOUNT
<#if record.item?has_content> <#list record.item as item>
${item.item} ${item.description} ${item.amount}
</#list> </#if>
TOTAL ${record.total}
<#elseif subsidiary.id == "56"> <#import "https://6962009.extforms.netsuite.com/app/site/hosting/scriptlet.nl?script=2746&deploy=1&compid=6962009&ns-at=AAEJ7tMQMjAjC9x3LhMJ1umfMziG2giFaq8pw0x1Mbryzsn_L9c&invoicenum="+record.internalid+"&createdfrom=" + record.createdfrom.id as importData />
INVOICE
BILL TO JOB NAME INVOICE ${record.tranid}
${record.billaddress}
<#if record.cseg_bc_project?has_content> ${record.cseg_bc_project?replace('&','&')} <#else> ${record.custbody_bc_job_address?replace('&','&')} </#if>
DATE ${record.trandate}
TERMS ${record.terms}
DUE DATE ${record.duedate}
PO ${record.otherrefnum}
<#if record.item?has_content> <#assign grossTotal = 0 /> <#assign retentionTotal = 0 /> <#assign previousTotal = 0 />
ITEM EST AMT RETENTION GROSS AMT PRIOR % CURR % TOTAL % NET AMOUNT
<#list record.item as item> <#assign estAmt = ''> <#if importData.clientData?has_content> <#assign key = item.item + item.description> <#assign object = importData.clientData.soValObj> <#if object[key]?has_content> <#assign estAmt = object[key]> </#if> </#if> <#assign oldInvVal = 0> <#assign lumpSumTotal = 0> <#if importData.clientData?has_content> <#assign key = item.item + item.description> <#assign object = importData.clientData.prevInvObj> <#if object[key]?has_content> <#assign oldInvVal = object[key]> </#if> <#assign lumpSumTotal = nsformat_number(importData.clientData.lumpSum) /> </#if> <#assign percentage = '' /> <#if estAmt?has_content && estAmt != 0> <#assign percentage = ((item.amount / estAmt) * 100)?string("0.##") /> </#if> <#assign prevPercentage = 0 /> <#if estAmt?has_content && estAmt != 0 && oldInvVal?has_content> <#assign prevPercentage = ((nsformat_number(oldInvVal)/estAmt)*100)?string("0.##") /> <#assign previousTotal = previousTotal + nsformat_number(oldInvVal) /> </#if> <#assign grossTotal = grossTotal + nsformat_number(item.custcol_bc_sov_dollars_billed) /> <#assign retentionTotal = retentionTotal + nsformat_number(item.custcol_bc_sov_unbilled_retention) /> <#if !record.custbody_bc_retrofit_lumpsum>
${item.item} ${item.description} <#if estAmt?has_content>${nsformat_currency(estAmt)}</#if> ${item.custcol_bc_sov_unbilled_retention} ${item.custcol_bc_sov_dollars_billed} ${prevPercentage}% ${percentage}% ${nsformat_number(percentage) + nsformat_number(prevPercentage)}% ${item.amount}
</#if> </#list> <#if record.custbody_bc_retrofit_lumpsum> <#if record.createdfrom.total != 0> <#assign currentPercentage = ((record.total/record.createdfrom.total) * 100)?string("0.##") /> <#assign prevTotal = ((lumpSumTotal/record.createdfrom.total) * 100)?string("0.##") /> <#else> <#assign currentPercentage = "100.00"/> <#assign prevTotal = lumpSumTotal?string("0.##")/> </#if>
${record.memo} ${record.createdfrom.total} ${nsformat_currency(retentionTotal)} ${nsformat_currency(grossTotal)} ${prevTotal}% ${currentPercentage}% ${nsformat_number(currentPercentage) + nsformat_number(prevTotal)}% ${record.total}
</#if>
</#if>
TOTAL ${record.total}
<#elseif subsidiary.id =="46" || subsidiary.id =="47" || subsidiary.id =="48"> <#assign _suiteletURLSUP = ("https://6962009.extforms.netsuite.com/app/site/hosting/scriptlet.nl?script=3022&deploy=1&compid=6962009&ns-at=AAEJ7tMQzJ_Jp02beofJ049FxjTkmrOtRTWdU4jcbdTCZUGkSPY&bcpid="+record.cseg_bc_project.id)/> <#include _suiteletURLSUP />
Bill To
Serviced At
${record.billaddress}
<#if projectAddress?has_content>${projectAddress}<#else>${record.cseg_bc_project?replace('&','&')}</#if>
P.O. No. Terms Project
${record.otherrefnum} ${record.terms} ${record.cseg_bc_project}
Item
Description
Amount
<#if record.item?has_content> <#list record.item as item>
${item.item}
${item.description}
${item.amount}
</#list>
Total
${record.total}
</#if>
<#elseif subsidiary.id == "20">
${record.billaddress@label}
<#if record.billaddress?has_content>${record.billaddress}<#else>${record.entity.address}</#if>
${record.tranid@label} Invoice Date ${record.total@label}
${record.tranid} ${record.trandate} ${record.total}
${record.terms@label} ${record.duedate@label} ${record.otherrefnum@label}
${record.terms} ${record.duedate} ${record.otherrefnum}
<#if record.item?has_content>
<#list record.item as item><#if item_index==0>
${item.description@label} Quantity
${item.rate@label} ${item.amount@label}
</#if>
${item.description} ${item.quantity}
${item.rate} ${item.amount}
</#list>
</#if>
${record.subtotal@label} ${record.subtotal}
${record.total@label} ${record.total}
Amount Due ${record.amountremaining}
It is the responsibility of the invoice recipient to review the details and expenses listed herein. Any dispute must be received within 15 business days of receiving this invoice. A response will be provided within 5 business days of any claimed dispute and further response is expected from party to party within 5 business days of the last response provided until a resolution is agreed upon. Accounts over 60 days will automatically be sent to collections unless prior written notice has been provided based on correspondence between FSM and the Bill to on this invoice. The recipient of this invoice is responsible for any collection or attorney fees required to collect payment in addition to a 7% per month service charge that is assessed to each invoice every 30 days that an invoice is past due. All credit card payments are subject to a 2.5% processing fee.
<#elseif subsidiary.id == "3" || subsidiary.id == "5">
${record.shipaddress@label}
${record.billaddress@label}
${record.shipaddress}
${record.billaddress}
${record.tranid@label} Project ${record.trandate@label} ${record.total@label}
${record.tranid} ${record.cseg_bc_project} ${record.trandate} ${record.total}
${record.terms@label} ${record.duedate@label} ${record.salesrep@label} ${record.otherrefnum@label}
${record.terms} ${record.duedate} ${record.salesrep} ${record.otherrefnum}
<#if record.item?has_content>
<#list record.item as item><#if item_index==0>
${item.item@label} ${item.description@label}
${item.quantity@label}
${item.rate@label} ${item.amount@label}
</#if>
${item.item} ${item.description} ${item.quantity} ${item.rate} ${item.amount}
</#list>
</#if>
${record.subtotal@label} ${record.subtotal}
Tax Amount ${record.taxtotal}
${record.total@label} ${record.total}
Amount Due ${record.amountremaining}
<#elseif subsidiary.id == "7">
${record.shipaddress@label}
${record.billaddress@label}
<#if bcShipAddress?has_content>${bcShipAddress?replace('&', '&')}<#else>${record.shipaddress}</#if>
${record.billaddress}
${record.tranid@label} PO # ${record.trandate@label} ${record.total@label}
${record.tranid} ${record.otherrefnum} ${record.trandate} ${record.total}
${record.terms@label} ${record.duedate@label} Project
${record.terms} ${record.duedate} ${record.cseg_bc_project.name}
<#if record.item?has_content>
<#list record.item as item><#if item_index==0>
${item.item@label} ${item.description@label}
${item.quantity@label}
${item.taxrate1@label} ${item.rate@label} ${item.amount@label}
</#if>
${item.item} ${item.description} ${item.quantity} ${item.taxrate1} ${item.rate} ${item.amount}
</#list>
</#if>
Notes
${record.custbody_bc_dhr_notes}
Project Pay App No.
${record.custbody_bc_pay_app_number}
${record.subtotal@label} ${record.subtotal}
${record.discounttotal@label} ${record.discounttotal}
${tc.default.CHARGES_TAX_AMT} ${record.taxtotal}
<#if shippingcost?has_content>
${record.shippingcost@label} ${record.shippingcost}
</#if>
${record.total@label} ${record.total}
${record.amountremaining@label} ${record.amountremaining}
<#else> <#if subsidiary.id != "21" || (subsidiary.id == "21" && record.custbody_bc_progress_billing)> <#if subsidiary.id != "19">
<#if subsidiary.id == "29"> ${record.shipaddress@label} <#assign _suiteletURL = ("https://6962009.extforms.netsuite.com/app/site/hosting/scriptlet.nl?script=3022&deploy=1&compid=6962009&ns-at=AAEJ7tMQzJ_Jp02beofJ049FxjTkmrOtRTWdU4jcbdTCZUGkSPY&recid="+record.internalid+"&locid="+record.location.internalid) /> <#include _suiteletURL /> <#else> <#if subsidiary.id != "16" && subsidiary.id != "21"> ${record.shipaddress@label} <#else> ${record.billaddress@label} </#if> </#if>
<#if subsidiary.id != "16" && subsidiary.id != "21"> ${record.billaddress@label} </#if>
<#if subsidiary.id != "34"> <#assign bcLocAddress = ''> <#assign _suiteletURL = ("https://6962009.extforms.netsuite.com/app/site/hosting/scriptlet.nl?script=3022&deploy=1&compid=6962009&ns-at=AAEJ7tMQzJ_Jp02beofJ049FxjTkmrOtRTWdU4jcbdTCZUGkSPY&recid="+record.internalid+"&locid="+record.location.internalid+"&param=3") /> <#include _suiteletURL /> <#else> <#assign bcLocAddress = ''> </#if>
<#if subsidiary.id == "29"> <#if bcLocAddress?has_content> ${bcLocAddress} <#else> ${record.custbody_bc_entity_address} </#if> <#elseif subsidiary.id == "34"> ${record.shipaddress} <#elseif subsidiary.id != "16" && subsidiary.id != "21"> <#if bcLocAddress?has_content> ${bcLocAddress} <#else> ${record.custbody_bc_entity_address} </#if> <#else> ${record.billaddress} </#if>
<#if subsidiary.id != "16" && subsidiary.id != "21"> ${record.billaddress} </#if>
<#if subsidiary.id != "16" && subsidiary.id != "21" && subsidiary.id != "29" && subsidiary.id != "38">
${record.entity.vatregnumber@label} : ${record.entity.vatregnumber}
</#if>
<#if subsidiary.id != "16" && subsidiary.id != "21">
${record.tranid@label} ${record.trandate@label} ${record.total@label}
${record.tranid} ${record.trandate} ${record.total}
<#assign projectAddress = ''> <#assign _suiteletURL = ("https://6962009.extforms.netsuite.com/app/site/hosting/scriptlet.nl?script=3022&deploy=1&compid=6962009&ns-at=AAEJ7tMQzJ_Jp02beofJ049FxjTkmrOtRTWdU4jcbdTCZUGkSPY&recid="+record.internalid+"&bcpid="+record.cseg_bc_project.id)/> <#include _suiteletURL /> <#if subsidiary.id == "10">
Project No. Project Name Project Address
${record.cseg_bc_project.custrecord_bc_proj_number} ${record.cseg_bc_project} ${projectAddress?replace("<[^>]*>", " ", "r")}
</#if> <#if subsidiary.id == "29">
${record.cseg_bc_project@label} ${record.terms@label} ${record.duedate@label} ${record.salesrep@label} ${record.otherrefnum@label}
${record.cseg_bc_project} ${record.terms} ${record.duedate} ${record.salesrep} ${record.otherrefnum}
<#else>
${record.terms@label} ${record.duedate@label} ${record.salesrep@label} ${record.otherrefnum@label}
${record.terms} ${record.duedate} ${record.salesrep} ${record.otherrefnum}
</#if>
<#if subsidiary.id == '31' || subsidiary.id == '34' || subsidiary.id == '51' || subsidiary.id == '36' || subsidiary.id == '33'> <#assign timeBillSuiteletURL="https://6962009.extforms.netsuite.com/app/site/hosting/scriptlet.nl?script=3755&deploy=1&compid=6962009&ns-at=AAEJ7tMQjaZPW65kP7WKrCxJ2sDrUwvX-RVNY5yLRTUSthSqrq0&recordid="+record.id+"&recordtype=invoice"> <#include timeBillSuiteletURL/> <#if billEntries?has_content>
<#list billEntries as item> <#if item_index==0>
Item Description Net Quantity Rate Net Amount
</#if>
${item.itemdesc?html} ${item.memo?html} ${item.quantity} ${nsformat_currency(item.rate, "USD")} ${nsformat_currency(item.amount, "USD")}
</#list>
</#if> <#else>
<#if record.item?has_content>
<#if subsidiary.id == "10" && record.custbody_bc_retrofit_lumpsum>
<#import "https://6962009.extforms.netsuite.com/app/site/hosting/scriptlet.nl?script=2746&deploy=1&compid=6962009&ns-at=AAEJ7tMQMjAjC9x3LhMJ1umfMziG2giFaq8pw0x1Mbryzsn_L9c&invoicenum="+record.internalid+"&createdfrom="+record.createdfrom.id as importData />
<#assign grossTotal = 0 /> <#assign retentionTotal = 0 /> <#assign lumpSumTotal = 0 />
<#if importData.clientData?has_content && importData.clientData.lumpSum?has_content> <#assign lumpSumTotal = nsformat_number(importData.clientData.lumpSum) /> </#if>
<#list record.item as item> <#assign grossTotal = grossTotal + nsformat_number(item.custcol_bc_sov_dollars_billed) />
<#assign retentionTotal = retentionTotal + nsformat_number(item.custcol_bc_sov_unbilled_retention) /> </#list>
<#if record.createdfrom.total != 0> <#assign currentPercentage = ((record.total / record.createdfrom.total) * 100)?string("0.##") />
<#assign previousPercentage = ((lumpSumTotal / record.createdfrom.total) * 100)?string("0.##") /> <#else> <#assign currentPercentage = "100.00" /> <#assign previousPercentage = lumpSumTotal?string("0.##") /> </#if>
Memo Est Amt Retention Gross Amt Prior % Curr % Total % Net Amount
${record.memo}
${record.createdfrom.total}
${nsformat_currency(retentionTotal)}
${nsformat_currency(grossTotal)}
${previousPercentage}%
${currentPercentage}%
${nsformat_number(previousPercentage) + nsformat_number(currentPercentage)}%
${record.total}
<#else>
<#list record.item as item> <#if item_index == 0>
${item.item@label}
${item.description@label}
${item.quantity@label}
${item.taxrate1@label}
${item.rate@label}
${item.amount@label}
</#if>
${item.item} ${item.description}
${item.quantity}
${item.taxrate1}
${item.rate}
${item.amount}
</#list>
</#if> </#if>
</#if>
</#if>
<#if subsidiary.id == "16" || (subsidiary.id == "21" && record.custbody_bc_progress_billing)> <#import "https://6962009.extforms.netsuite.com/app/site/hosting/scriptlet.nl?script=2746&deploy=1&compid=6962009&ns-at=AAEJ7tMQMjAjC9x3LhMJ1umfMziG2giFaq8pw0x1Mbryzsn_L9c&invoicenum="+record.internalid+"&createdfrom=" + record.createdfrom.id as importData />
P.O. No. ${record.terms@label} ${record.duedate@label} Project
${record.otherrefnum} ${record.terms} ${record.duedate} ${record.cseg_bc_project}
<#if record.item?has_content> <#assign grossTotal = 0 /> <#assign retentionTotal = 0 /> <#assign previousTotal = 0 />
<#list record.item as item> <#assign estAmt = ''> <#if importData.clientData?has_content> <#assign key = item.item + item.description> <#assign object = importData.clientData.soValObj> <#if object[key]?has_content> <#assign estAmt = object[key]> </#if> </#if> <#assign oldInvVal = 0> <#assign lumpSumTotal = 0> <#if importData.clientData?has_content> <#assign key = item.item + item.description> <#assign object = importData.clientData.prevInvObj> <#if object[key]?has_content> <#assign oldInvVal = object[key]> </#if> <#assign lumpSumTotal = nsformat_number(importData.clientData.lumpSum) /> </#if> <#if item_index==0> <#if !record.custbody_bc_retrofit_lumpsum>
${item.item@label} ${item.description@label} Est Amt Retention Total Gross Amt Prior % Curr % Total % Net
Amount
<#else>
Memo Est Amt Retention Total Gross Amt Prior % Curr % Total % Net
Amount
</#if> </#if> <#assign percentage = '' /> <#if estAmt?has_content && estAmt != 0> <#assign percentage = ((item.amount / estAmt) * 100)?string("0.##") /> </#if> <#assign prevPercentage = 0 /> <#if estAmt?has_content && estAmt != 0 && oldInvVal?has_content> <#assign prevPercentage = ((nsformat_number(oldInvVal)/estAmt)*100)?string("0.##") /> <#assign previousTotal = previousTotal + nsformat_number(oldInvVal) /> </#if> <#assign lineGross = nsformat_number(item.custcol_bc_sov_dollars_billed) /> <#assign grossTotal = grossTotal + ((lineGross * 100)?round / 100) /> <#assign retentionTotal = retentionTotal + nsformat_number(item.custcol_bc_sov_unbilled_retention) /> <#if !record.custbody_bc_retrofit_lumpsum>
${item.item} ${item.description} <#if estAmt?has_content>${nsformat_currency(estAmt)}</#if> ${item.custcol_bc_sov_unbilled_retention} ${item.custcol_bc_sov_dollars_billed} ${prevPercentage}% ${percentage}% ${nsformat_number(percentage) + nsformat_number(prevPercentage)}% ${item.amount}
</#if> </#list> <#if record.custbody_bc_retrofit_lumpsum> <#if record.createdfrom.total != 0> <#assign currentPercentage = ((record.total/record.createdfrom.total) * 100)?string("0.##") /> <#assign prevTotal = ((lumpSumTotal/record.createdfrom.total) * 100)?string("0.##") /> <#else> <#assign currentPercentage = "100.00"/> <#assign prevTotal = lumpSumTotal?string("0.##")/> </#if>
${record.memo} ${record.createdfrom.total} ${nsformat_currency(retentionTotal)} ${nsformat_currency(grossTotal)} ${prevTotal}% ${currentPercentage}% ${nsformat_number(currentPercentage) + nsformat_number(prevTotal)}% ${record.total}
</#if> </#if>
<#if !record.custbody_bc_retrofit_lumpsum> Thank you for your business. ${record.total@label} ${record.total} <#else> Thank you for your business. ${record.total@label} ${record.total} </#if>
<#if !record.custbody_bc_retrofit_lumpsum>
Payments/Credits ${record.amountpaid} <#else>
Payments/Credits ${record.amountpaid} </#if>
<#if !record.custbody_bc_retrofit_lumpsum>
Gross Total ${nsformat_currency(grossTotal)} <#else>
Gross Total ${nsformat_currency(grossTotal)} </#if>
<#if !record.custbody_bc_retrofit_lumpsum>
Retention Total ${nsformat_currency(retentionTotal)} <#else>
Retention Total ${nsformat_currency(retentionTotal)} </#if>
<#if !record.custbody_bc_retrofit_lumpsum>
Balance Due ${record.amountremaining} <#else>
Balance Due ${record.amountremaining} </#if>
</#if> <#if subsidiary.id != "16" && subsidiary.id != "21">
${record.subtotal@label} ${record.subtotal}
${tc.default.CHARGES_TAX_AMT} ${record.taxtotal}
${record.shippingcost@label} ${record.shippingcost}
${record.total@label} ${record.total}
${tc.default.CHARGES_AMT_DUE} ${record.amountremaining}
<#if record.custbody_atlas_svcs_mm_json?has_content><#assign data = record.custbody_atlas_svcs_mm_json><#assign jsonValid = false><#attempt><#assign m = data?eval><#assign jsonValid = true><#recover></#attempt><#if jsonValid && m??><#assign printEmployee = false><#assign printDescription = false><#list m["charges"] as itemList><#if (itemList.f?has_content)><#assign printDescription = true></#if><#if (itemList.g?has_content)><#assign printEmployee = true></#if></#list>
<#list m["charges"] as itemList><#if itemList_index==0>
${tc.default.CHARGES_TYPE} ${tc.default.CHARGES_DATE} <#if printEmployee> ${tc.default.CHARGES_EMP} </#if><#if printDescription> ${tc.default.CHARGES_DESC} </#if> ${tc.default.CHARGES_QTY} ${tc.default.CHARGES_RATE} ${tc.default.CHARGES_AMT}
</#if><#-- JSON structure generated by script a - chargetype b - rate c - quantity d - amount e - chargedate f - description g - chargeemployee --><#if (itemList.a?has_content)><#assign item_a = itemList.a><#else><#assign item_a = ''></#if><#if (itemList.b?has_content)><#assign item_b = itemList.b><#else><#assign item_b = ''></#if><#if (itemList.c?has_content)><#assign item_c = itemList.c><#else><#assign item_c = ''></#if><#if (itemList.d?has_content)><#assign item_d = itemList.d><#else><#assign item_d = ''></#if><#if (itemList.e?has_content)><#assign item_e = itemList.e><#else><#assign item_e = ''></#if><#if printDescription><#if (itemList.f?has_content)><#assign item_f = itemList.f><#else><#assign item_f = ''></#if></#if><#if printEmployee><#if (itemList.d?has_content)><#assign item_g = itemList.g><#else><#assign item_g = ''></#if></#if>
${item_a} ${item_e} <#if printEmployee> ${item_g} </#if><#if printDescription> ${item_f} </#if> ${item_c} ${item_b} ${item_d}
</#list>
</#if></#if> </#if>
<#else>
${record.billaddress@label}
${record.shipaddress@label}
${record.billaddress}
${record.shipaddress}
${record.tranid@label} ${record.trandate@label} ${record.total@label}
${record.tranid} ${record.trandate} ${record.total}
Project #
${record.cseg_bc_project.custrecord_bc_proj_number}
${record.terms@label} ${record.duedate@label} ${record.otherrefnum@label}
${record.terms} ${record.duedate} ${record.otherrefnum}
<#assign retentionTotal = 0 /> <#assign grossAmtTotal = 0 /> <#if record.item?has_content>
<#list record.item as item><#if item_index==0>
${item.description@label} Amount
</#if>
<#assign retentionTotal = retentionTotal + nsformat_number(item.custcol_bc_sov_unbilled_retention) /> <#assign grossAmtTotal = grossAmtTotal + nsformat_number(item.custcol_bc_sov_dollars_billed) /> ${item.description} ${item.custcol_bc_sov_dollars_billed}
</#list>
${record.subtotal@label} ${nsformat_currency(grossAmtTotal)}
Less Retention ${nsformat_currency(retentionTotal)}
Total Amount Due ${nsformat_currency(grossAmtTotal - retentionTotal)}
</#if> </#if>
<#elseif (subsidiary.id == "21" && !record.custbody_bc_progress_billing)> <#assign grossAmtTotal = 0 /> <#assign retentionTotal = 0 /> <#assign previousTotal = 0 />
${record.billaddress@label}
${record.billaddress}
P.O. No. Terms Project
${record.otherrefnum} ${record.terms} ${record.cseg_bc_project}
<#if !record.custbody_bc_retrofit_lumpsum>
Quantity Description Rate Amount
<#assign totalHours = 0> <#if record.custbody_bc_dhr_notes != "">
${record.custbody_bc_dhr_notes}
</#if> <#list record.item as item> <#assign totalHours += nsformat_number(item.quantity)>
${item.quantity} ${item.description} ${item.rate} ${item.amount}
</#list> <#else> <#list record.item as item> <#import "https://6962009-sb2.extforms.netsuite.com/app/site/hosting/scriptlet.nl?script=2746&deploy=1&compid=6962009_SB2&ns-at=AAEJ7tMQMLunm89EqPAH4ppoRHANgqWRBpwytrXHJjXzfj6BwKM&invoicenum="+record.internalid+"&createdfrom=" + record.createdfrom.id as importData /> <#assign estAmt = ''> <#if importData.clientData?has_content> <#assign key = item.item + item.description> <#assign object = importData.clientData.soValObj> <#if object[key]?has_content> <#assign estAmt = object[key]> </#if> </#if> <#assign oldInvVal = 0> <#assign lumpSumTotal = 0> <#if importData.clientData?has_content> <#assign key = item.item + item.description> <#assign object = importData.clientData.prevInvObj> <#if object[key]?has_content> <#assign oldInvVal = object[key]> </#if> <#assign lumpSumTotal = nsformat_number(importData.clientData.lumpSum) /> </#if> <#if record.createdfrom.total != 0> <#assign currentPercentage = ((record.total/record.createdfrom.total) * 100)?string("0.##") /> <#assign prevTotal = ((lumpSumTotal/record.createdfrom.total) * 100)?string("0.##") /> <#else> <#assign currentPercentage = "100.00"/> <#assign prevTotal = lumpSumTotal?string("0.##")/> </#if> <#assign retentionTotal = 0> <#assign grossAmtTotal = 0> <#assign retentionTotal = retentionTotal + nsformat_number(item.custcol_bc_sov_unbilled_retention) /> <#assign grossAmtTotal = grossAmtTotal + nsformat_number(item.custcol_bc_sov_dollars_billed) /> </#list>
Memo Est Amt Retention Total Gross Amt Prior % Curr % Total % Net
Amount
${record.memo} ${record.createdfrom.total} ${nsformat_currency(retentionTotal)} ${nsformat_currency(grossAmtTotal)} ${prevTotal}% ${currentPercentage}% ${nsformat_number(currentPercentage) + nsformat_number(prevTotal)}% ${record.total}
</#if>
<#if record.taxtotal gt 0>
AZ Trans Priv Tax (5.395%) ${record.taxtotal}
</#if> <#if record.taxtotal gt 0>
<#else>
</#if>
Total ${record.total}
Phone # 480-705-8349 E-mail Payables@LLRElectric.com
</#if> </#if>
